case_title: MAURILIO SILVA et al VS. ROBERTO BETANZOS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,425.00 FILED BY SILVA, MAURILIO RAMIREZ, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT BETANZOS, ROBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-25-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BETANZOS, ROBERTO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-12-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. SONIA MONTENEGRO ACTS AS A SPANISH INTERPRETER ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT BETANZOS, ROBERTO
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 6/18/12 TO PLAINTIFF MAURILIO SILVA, "RETURN TO SENDER/DOES NOT LIVE AT THAT ADDRESS".
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BETANZOS, ROBERTO
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED 5/29/12 TO PLAINTIFF MAURILIO SILVA, "ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD".

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2012 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO JUN-12-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT WAS SERVED MAY 25, 2012. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED 5/29/12 TO DEFENDANT ROBERTO BETANZOS, "ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 6/18/12 TO DEFENDANT ROBERTO BETANZOS, "ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SILVA, MAURILIO RAMIREZ, MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BETANZOS, ROBERTO $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,130.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
